About
Rajat Kumar Sahu
Who I Am

Building robust systems,
one commit at a time

Rajat Kumar Sahu is a Computer Science undergraduate at Lovely Professional University with a passion for backend engineering and data-driven systems. With hands-on experience in Java, Spring Boot, and Python, he crafts scalable REST APIs and ML pipelines that solve real-world problems.


From architecting microservices to deploying ML dashboards on Streamlit, Rajat brings a full-stack mindset to every challenge — always learning, always shipping.
